name: Asthma
summary: Chronic respiratory disease characterized by variable airflow obstruction, bronchial hyperresponsiveness, and airway inflammation. Part of the atopic march. Phenotypic spectrum from mild intermittent to severe therapy-resistant. SNP heritability h²~0.15–0.20.

name: Ambient Air Pollution (PM2.5)
summary: Fine particulate matter ≤2.5 μm from combustion and secondary formation. Induces oxidative stress and NF-κB activation in airways; amplifies IL-33 and inflammatory cytokines. G×E with IL33, GSTP1, TNF.

name: IL33 — Interleukin 33
summary: Epithelial alarmin on chromosome 9p24.1. Released upon cell damage; activates ILC2s, mast cells, Th2 via ST2. Asthma GWAS variants regulate expression via enhancer. Induced by PM2.5 and NF-κB.
synonyms: nuclear factor from high endothelial venules

name: NF-κB Signaling Pathway
summary: Master regulator of inflammatory gene expression. KEGG hsa04064. Activated by PM2.5, tobacco, LPS, diesel. Key genes: RELA, NFKB1, IKBKG, IL33 (upstream), TNF, IL6, IL8 (downstream).

name: PM2.5 + IL33 + NF-κB → Asthma
summary: Mechanism brief: PM2.5 amplifies IL-33–mediated airway inflammation via NF-κB in genetically susceptible individuals. Chain: PM2.5 → ROS → NF-κB → IL33 → ST2 → ILC2/mast → Th2 cascade → eosinophilic inflammation → AHR.
